    Module: cor_coxph

    module-cor-coxph.Rmd

    Purpose

    cor_coxph fits Cox proportional hazards models to estimate the association between immunological markers and COVID-19 endpoint risk. It produces hazard ratio tables, forest plots, and marginalized risk curves for each correlate of risk (CoR) timepoint.

    Source module: correlates_reporting2/cor_coxph/
    Key reports: report_by_COR.Rmd, forestplots_*.Rmd, assembled into a bookdown PDF chapter.

    Example data 

    report_root  <- "/path/to/correlates_reporting2"
moderna_path <- file.path(
  report_root, "data_clean",
  "moderna_mock_data_processed_with_riskscore.csv"
)
janssen_path <- file.path(
  report_root, "data_clean",
  "janssen_pooled_mock_data_processed_with_riskscore.csv"
)

    Reproduce the report

    1. Configure the session 

    library(utilrep2)

report_root <- "/path/to/correlates_reporting2"
setup_session(
  trial       = "moderna_mock",
  platform    = "linux",
  data_path   = file.path(report_root, "data_clean"),
  report_root = report_root
)

    2. Run the module 

    run_cor_coxph(trial = "moderna_mock")

    For moderna_mock this runs cor_coxph.R for each CoR timepoint (D29, D57, D57over29, D29start28) and then cor_graphical_time_to_event.R for D29D57.

    # For vat08_combined, specify the analysis stage
Sys.setenv(stage = "2")
run_cor_coxph(trial = "vat08_combined")
    # Janssen mock
setup_session(trial = "janssen_pooled_mock",
              data_path = file.path(report_root, "data_clean"))
run_cor_coxph(trial = "janssen_pooled_mock")

    3. Build the chapter PDF 

    build_chapter_report("cor_coxph", trial = "moderna_mock")

    Output

    Results are saved under cor_coxph/output/<trial>/:

    • _coef_*.csv — hazard ratio coefficient tables
    • _marginalized_risks*.pdf — marginalized risk curve plots
    • forestplots_*.pdf — forest plot figures

    Report sections (from report_by_COR.Rmd)

    • Hazard ratio tables (unadjusted and adjusted)
    • Marginalized risk curves by marker tertile
    • Forest plots across trials / timepoints

    Supported trials

    Most trials are supported; scripts dispatch on TRIAL.

    Trial family CoR timepoints
    moderna_mock, moderna_real D29, D57, D57over29, D29start28
    janssen_pooled_mock / EUA D29, D29start1
    janssen_pooled_partA / partA variants D29IncludeNotMolecConfirmed + severity variants
    hvtn705 variants D210
    prevent19 D35
    vat08_combined D43 nAb/bAb (stage 2), or stage 1 variant
    covail variants D15toX windows
    profiscov D43, D91

    Developed by Y H.

    Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
